title: Just a Green Screen
description: A green screen block for video and photo creation.
body:
This mod adds a green screen for creating content.

You can get the block with the creative menu or with this command:

![Command](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ee6f5674d05a90a704dda24fdf34787ed303cb1.png)

If you wanna get it in survival use a glowstone & green dye to get it (this recipe is shapeless)

![GS Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f75ad90795fd9d41a81137ffcfc434e52777c2da.png)

To make videos use a recording software (I recommand **OBS**) and in your video editing software use a tool called "Chroma Key" to remove the green. 

To make photos use F2 or PrtSc to get a photo and use in your photo editing software Chroma Key or use a backround remover like [Remove.bg](https://www.remove.bg/).
